_doc: sws_validFrom and sws_validUntil are non-RFC-7517 SWS-namespaced fields enforcing per-kid issuance windows. Verifiers MUST reject when payload.iat is outside [validFrom, validUntil]. Round-2 cryptography review (2026-04-28): a leaked old key during a rotation grace window could otherwise mint receipts dated after the rotation.
